title: juncus trifidus subsp. monanthos
intro: Juncus trifidus subsp. monanthos, also known as three-angled rush or three-angled jointed rush, is a plant species within the Juncus trifidus complex. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Juncus trifidus subsp. monanthos include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating wounds, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Juncus trifidus subsp. monanthos include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are typically made by steeping the plant's roots, rhizomes, or leaves in hot water or other solvents.
